title: Heat illness buddy check for outdoor work
summary: A buddy-check routine for cleanup, farming, queue management, animal care, or foot evacuation during heat when people may ignore early illness signs.
content:
A buddy-check routine for cleanup, farming, queue management, animal care, or foot evacuation during heat when people may ignore early illness signs.

This card improves heat illness buddy check for outdoor work by making the action small, visible, and reversible. It helps a tired group avoid hidden assumptions while preserving emergency-service priority.

Core sequence: 1) Pair workers before starting and require each pair to check speech, balance, sweating, confusion, and water breaks. 2) Move heavy tasks to cooler hours and keep shade breaks scheduled, not optional. 3) Stop work for confusion, fainting, severe weakness, hot skin, vomiting, or behavior that does not fit the person. 4) Cool the person and seek urgent medical help when serious heat-illness signs appear.

Stop point: Do not use heat illness buddy check for outdoor work to bypass emergency responders, utility professionals, medical advice, or evacuation instructions.

steps: Pair workers before starting and require each pair to check speech, balance, sweating, confusion, and water breaks.

Cool the person and seek urgent medical help when serious heat-illness signs appear.
warnings: Do not continue heat illness buddy check for outdoor work if the action increases fire, fumes, contamination, injury, violence, or official-order risk.
Do not leave heat illness buddy check for outdoor work dependent on a single tired person without a written handover.
common_mistakes: Using heat illness buddy check for outdoor work without checking the weakest person first makes the routine look complete while help is still missing.
Changing heat illness buddy check for outdoor work verbally without changing the visible note creates two competing versions.

If equipment for heat illness buddy check for outdoor work is missing, use observation, distance, labeling, and official help instead of improvised high-risk repair.

Someone says they assumed heat illness buddy check for outdoor work was handled, but no time, owner, or result is written.
when_not_to_use: Do not use heat illness buddy check for outdoor work to bypass emergency responders, utility professionals, medical advice, or evacuation instructions.
Do not continue heat illness buddy check for outdoor work inside smoke, floodwater, sewage, unstable walls, or a location with suspected gas or electrical danger.
short_term: Before moving on, make the first result of heat illness buddy check for outdoor work visible and confirm one person can explain it in under thirty seconds.
long_term: After real use, improve heat illness buddy check for outdoor work by replacing unclear wording, weak storage choices, and unsafe shortcuts with local practice notes.
if_method_fails: If heat illness buddy check for outdoor work fails, mark the unsafe part unavailable, retreat to the last safe option, and request official or qualified support when needed.
environment_notes: Adapt heat illness buddy check for outdoor work to apartment blocks, farms, islands, camps, shops, ferries, heat, smoke, low light, noise, and mobility limits.
